dict.string: wayfind lets you attach photos to your activities, bookings, expenses, and trip documents.
Save trip photos and screenshots back to your photo library.
Take a photo of receipts, boarding passes, or anything you want to keep with your trip.
wayfind adds your trip itinerary to your calendar so you can see flights, hotels, and activities alongside your other plans. You can turn this off any time in Settings.
wayfind adds your trip itinerary to your calendar so you can see flights, hotels, and activities alongside your other plans. You can turn this off any time in Settings.
Find friends to invite to your trips by name. We never read or upload your contacts list.
